english_name: The First Epistle of Paul the Apostle to the Thessalonians

verses.latin_vulgate: De cetero ergo, fratres, rogamus vos et obsecramus in Domino Jesu, ut quemadmodum accepistis a nobis quomodn oporteat vos ambulare, et placere Deo, sic et ambuletis ut abundetis magis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τὸ λοιπὸν οὖν ἀδελφοί ἐρωτῶμεν ὑμᾶς καὶ παρακαλοῦμεν ἐν κυρίῳ ἰησοῦ καθὼς παρελάβετε παρ᾽ ἡμῶν τὸ πῶς δεῖ ὑμᾶς περιπατεῖν καὶ ἀρέσκειν θεῷ ἵνα περισσεύητε μᾶλλον
verses.king_james: Furthermore then we beseech you, brethren, and exhort *you* by the Lord Jesus, that as ye have received of us how ye ought tn walk and to please God, *so* ye would abound more and more.

verses.latin_vulgate: Scitis enim quæ præcepta dederim vobis per Dominum Jesum.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: οἴδατε γὰρ τίνας παραγγελίας ἐδώκαμεν ὑμῖν διὰ τοῦ κυρίου ἰησοῦ
verses.king_james: For ye know what commandments we gave you by the Lord Jesus.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc est enim voluntas Dei, sanctificatio vestra: ut abstineatis vos a fornicatione,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τοῦτο γάρ ἐστιν θέλημα τοῦ θεοῦ ὁ ἁγιασμὸς ὑμῶν ἀπέχεσθαι ὑμᾶς ἀπὸ τῆς πορνείας
verses.king_james: For this is the will of God, *even* your sanctification, that ye should abstain from fornication:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut sciat unusquisque vestrum vas suum possidere in sanctificatione, et honore:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: εἰδέναι ἕκαστον ὑμῶν τὸ ἑαυτοῦ σκεῦος κτᾶσθαι ἐν ἁγιασμῷ καὶ τιμῇ
verses.king_james: That every one of you should know how to possess his vessel in sanctification and honour;

verses.latin_vulgate: non in passione desiderii, sicut et gentes, quæ ignorant Deum:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: μὴ ἐν πάθει ἐπιθυμίας καθάπερ καὶ τὰ ἔθνη τὰ μὴ εἰδότα τὸν θεόν
verses.king_james: Not in the lust of concupiscence, even as the Gentiles which know not God:

verses.latin_vulgate: et ne quis supergrediatur, neque circumveniat in negotio fratrem suum: quoniam vindex est Dominus de his omnibus, sicut prædiximus vobis, et testificati sumus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τὸ μὴ ὑπερβαίνειν καὶ πλεονεκτεῖν ἐν τῷ πράγματι τὸν ἀδελφὸν αὐτοῦ διότι ἔκδικος ὁ κύριος περὶ πάντων τούτων καθὼς καὶ προείπαμεν ὑμῖν καὶ διεμαρτυράμεθα
verses.king_james: That no *man* go beyond and defraud his brother in *any* matter: because that the Lord *is* he avenger of all such, as we also have forewarned you and testified.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non enim vocavit nos Deus in immunditiam, sed in sanctificationem.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: οὐ γὰρ ἐκάλεσεν ἡμᾶς ὁ θεὸς ἐπὶ ἀκαθαρσίᾳ ἀλλ᾽ ἐν ἁγιασμῷ
verses.king_james: For God hath not called us unto uncleanness, but unto holiness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Itaque qui hæc spernit, non hominem spernit, sed Deum: qui etiam dedit Spiritum suum Sanctum in nobis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τοιγαροῦν ὁ ἀθετῶν οὐκ ἄνθρωπον ἀθετεῖ ἀλλὰ τὸν θεὸν τὸν καὶ δόντα τὸ πνεῦμα αὐτοῦ τὸ ἅγιον εἰς ἡμᾶς
verses.king_james: He therefore that despiseth, despiseth not man, but God, who hath also given unto us his holy Spirit.

verses.latin_vulgate: De caritate autem fraternitatis non necesse habemus scribere vobis: ipsi enim vos a Deo didicistis ut diligatis invicem.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: περὶ δὲ τῆς φιλαδελφίας οὐ χρείαν ἔχετε γράφειν ὑμῖν αὐτοὶ γὰρ ὑμεῖς θεοδίδακτοί ἐστε εἰς τὸ ἀγαπᾶν ἀλλήλους
verses.king_james: But as touching brotherly love ye need not that I write unto you: for ye yourselves are taught of God to love one another.

verses.latin_vulgate: Etenim illud facitis in omnes fratres in universa Macedonia. Rogamus autem vos, fratres, ut abundetis magis,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: καὶ γὰρ ποιεῖτε αὐτὸ εἰς πάντας τοὺς ἀδελφοὺς τοὺς ἐν ὅλῃ τῇ μακεδονίᾳ παρακαλοῦμεν δὲ ὑμᾶς ἀδελφοί περισσεύειν μᾶλλον
verses.king_james: And indeed ye do it toward all the brethren which are in all Macedonia: but we beseech you, brethren, that ye increase more and more;

verses.latin_vulgate: et opera detis ut quieti sitis, et ut vestrum negotium agatis, et operemini manibus vestris, sicut præcepimus vobis:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: καὶ φιλοτιμεῖσθαι ἡσυχάζειν καὶ πράσσειν τὰ ἴδια καὶ ἐργάζεσθαι ταῖς ἰδίαις χερσὶν ὑμῶν καθὼς ὑμῖν παρηγγείλαμεν
verses.king_james: And that ye study to be quiet, and to do your own business, and to work with your own hands, as we commanded you;

verses.latin_vulgate: et ut honeste ambuletis ad eos qui foris sunt: et nullius aliquid desideretis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἵνα περιπατῆτε εὐσχημόνως πρὸς τοὺς ἔξω καὶ μηδενὸς χρείαν ἔχητε
verses.king_james: That ye may walk honestly toward them that are without, and *that* ye may have lack of nothing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nolumus autem vos ignorare fratres de dormientibus, ut non contristemini sicut et ceteri, qui spem non habent.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: οὐ θέλω δὲ ὑμᾶς ἀγνοεῖν ἀδελφοί περὶ τῶν κεκοιμημένων, ἵνα μὴ λυπῆσθε καθὼς καὶ οἱ λοιποὶ οἱ μὴ ἔχοντες ἐλπίδα
verses.king_james: But I would not have you to be ignorant, brethren, concerning them which are asleep, that ye sorrow not, even as others which have no hope.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si enim credimus quod Jesus mortuus est, et resurrexit: ita et Deus eos qui dormierunt per Jesum, adducet cum eo.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: εἰ γὰρ πιστεύομεν ὅτι ἰησοῦς ἀπέθανεν καὶ ἀνέστη οὕτως καὶ ὁ θεὸς τοὺς κοιμηθέντας διὰ τοῦ ἰησοῦ ἄξει σὺν αὐτῷ
verses.king_james: For if we believe that Jesus died and rose again, even so them also which sleep in Jesus will God bring with him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hoc enim vobis dicimus in verbo Domini, quia nos, qui vivimus, qui residui sumus in adventum Domini, non præveniemus eos qui dormierunt.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τοῦτο γὰρ ὑμῖν λέγομεν ἐν λόγῳ κυρίου ὅτι ἡμεῖς οἱ ζῶντες οἱ περιλειπόμενοι εἰς τὴν παρουσίαν τοῦ κυρίου οὐ μὴ φθάσωμεν τοὺς κοιμηθέντας
verses.king_james: For this we say unto you by the word of the Lord, that we which are alive *and* remain unto the coming of the Lord shall not prevent them which are asleep.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam ipse Dominus in jussu, et in voce archangeli, et in tuba Dei descendet de cælo: et mortui, qui in Christo sunt, resurgent primi.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὅτι αὐτὸς ὁ κύριος ἐν κελεύσματι ἐν φωνῇ ἀρχαγγέλου καὶ ἐν σάλπιγγι θεοῦ καταβήσεται ἀπ᾽ οὐρανοῦ καὶ οἱ νεκροὶ ἐν χριστῷ ἀναστήσονται πρῶτον
verses.king_james: For the Lord himself shall descend from heaven with a shout, with the voice of the archangel, and with the trump of God: and the dead in Christ shall rise first:

verses.latin_vulgate: Deinde nos, qui vivimus, qui relinquimur, simul rapiemur cum illis in nubibus obviam Christo in aëra, et sic semper cum Domino erimus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἔπειτα ἡμεῖς οἱ ζῶντες οἱ περιλειπόμενοι ἅμα σὺν αὐτοῖς ἁρπαγησόμεθα ἐν νεφέλαις εἰς ἀπάντησιν τοῦ κυρίου εἰς ἀέρα καὶ οὕτως πάντοτε σὺν κυρίῳ ἐσόμεθα
verses.king_james: Then we which are alive *and* remain shall be caught up together with them in the clouds, to meet the Lord in the air: and so shall we ever be with the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Itaque consolamini invicem in verbis istis.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὥστε παρακαλεῖτε ἀλλήλους ἐν τοῖς λόγοις τούτοις
verses.king_james: Wherefore comfort one another with these words.
